LanguageData.JanitorsCloset.CleaningTool.WrongFilthCa: Tool not suited to this filth
LanguageData.JanitorsCloset.CleaningTool.SpecialtyExp: The cleaning speed bonus from this tool only applies to dry filth (dirt, dust, sand, ash). Wet filth (blood, vomit, water) cleans at vanilla speed.
The cleaning speed bonus from this tool only applies to wet filth (blood, vomit, water, slime). Dry filth (dirt, dust, sand) cleans at vanilla speed.
